strategy_synthesis.strategic_summary: The store is positioned as a category-specialist in the general-commerce market, focusing on SMEs in Germany with a curated selection of mass-premium tech products. store_blueprint.blueprint_narrative: SuppliedTech is a specialist in tech solutions for SMEs, offering reliable products to enhance productivity and connectivity. With a focus on mass-premium pricing, we aim to become the go-to partner for small and medium enterprises seeking tech solutions.
